SELLER: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm calling from DeepData AI. I came across Tacton and was impressed with your work in redefining how manufacturers engage their buyers. I'd like to introduce our data processing solution that can help streamline your operations and improve efficiency.

BUYER: Ah, yes. We're always looking for ways to improve our processes. But I have to say, we've recently implemented a new CPQ platform and our focus is on getting the most out of that investment right now. What makes your solution unique?

SELLER: That's great to hear about the CPQ platform. Our DeepData AI solution can actually complement your existing system by providing more advanced data analytics and processing capabilities. This can help you gain deeper insights into your sales and manufacturing operations, and make more informed decisions. We've had success with similar manufacturers in the past, with some seeing up to 20% reduction in operational costs.

BUYER: I see. That sounds interesting, but I'm concerned about the integration process. We've just gone through a significant implementation with our CPQ platform and I don't know if we're ready to take on another project like that. Plus, our IT team is already stretched thin. How complex is the integration with your solution?

SELLER: I completely understand your concerns about integration. Our solution is designed to be flexible and adaptable, and we've worked with similar systems in the past. We can provide a customized integration plan that fits your needs and timeline. Additionally, our solution is cloud-based, so it can be scaled up or down as needed, without putting a strain on your IT resources.

BUYER: Okay, that sounds a bit more manageable. But what about the cost? We're looking to optimize our budget right now, and I'm not sure if this is something we can afford. What kind of pricing are we talking about?

SELLER: Our pricing is competitive with other data processing solutions on the market. We offer a tiered pricing structure, based on the level of usage and the size of the organization. I can provide you with a customized quote based on your specific needs. However, I want to emphasize that our solution can help you reduce costs in the long run by improving operational efficiency and reducing errors.

BUYER: I appreciate the offer, but to be honest, this is just not a priority for us right now. We're in the middle of a critical project and our team is fully allocated. I don't see us being able to take on another initiative like this for at least the next 6-12 months. I appreciate your understanding, and I'm going to have to decline your proposal at this time.
